nasb.text: As often as the king entered the house of the Lord, the guards came and carried them and then brought them back into the guards’ room.

esv.text: And as often as the king went into the house of the Lord, the guard came and carried them and brought them back to the guardroom.

cnv.text: 每逢王進耶和華殿的時候，守衛就來拿這些盾牌，事後又把盾牌送回守衛房那裡。

ccb.text: 每次王进耶和华的殿，护卫兵就带上盾牌，用完后放回护卫房。
